mapper.sql: id, receiver_id, receiver_role, type, title, content, biz_type, biz_id, is_read, is_deleted, created_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, receiver_role, type, title, content, biz_type, biz_id, is_read, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{receiverRole}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, 0, 0 )

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, receiver_role, type, title, content, biz_type, biz_id, is_read, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.receiverId}, #{item.receiverRole}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.bizId}, 0, 0 )
